mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, original_filename, file_size, file_type, storage_path, encrypted_size, encrypted_file_key, iv, auth_tag, file_hash, upload_time, last_download_time, download_count, description, is_folder FROM t_file WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY upload_time DESC

SELECT id, user_id, original_filename, file_size, file_type, storage_path, encrypted_size, encrypted_file_key, iv, auth_tag, file_hash, upload_time, last_download_time, download_count, description, is_folder FROM t_file WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY upload_time DESC

SELECT id, user_id, original_filename, file_size, file_type, storage_path, encrypted_size, encrypted_file_key, iv, auth_tag, file_hash, upload_time, last_download_time, download_count, description, is_folder FROM t_file
user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0
AND original_filename LIKE CONCAT('%', #{fileName}, '%')
AND description LIKE CONCAT('%', #{description}, '%')
AND (original_filename LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR description LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY upload_time DESC

SELECT id, user_id, original_filename, file_size, file_type, storage_path, encrypted_size, encrypted_file_key, iv, auth_tag, file_hash, upload_time, last_download_time, download_count, description, is_folder FROM t_file WHERE id = #{fileId} AND user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0

SELECT id, user_id, original_filename, file_size, file_type, storage_path, encrypted_size, encrypted_file_key, iv, auth_tag, file_hash, upload_time, last_download_time, download_count, description, is_folder, deleted FROM t_file WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 1 ORDER BY upload_time DESC

SELECT id, user_id, original_filename, file_size, file_type, storage_path, encrypted_size, encrypted_file_key, iv, auth_tag, file_hash, upload_time, last_download_time, download_count, description, is_folder, deleted FROM t_file WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 1 ORDER BY upload_time DESC

SELECT id, user_id, original_filename, file_size, file_type, storage_path, encrypted_size, encrypted_file_key, iv, auth_tag, file_hash, upload_time, last_download_time, download_count, description, is_folder, deleted FROM t_file
deleted = 1
AND user_id = #{userId}
AND original_filename LIKE CONCAT('%', #{fileName}, '%')
ORDER BY upload_time DESC

SELECT id, user_id, original_filename, file_size, file_type, storage_path, encrypted_size, encrypted_file_key, iv, auth_tag, file_hash, upload_time, last_download_time, download_count, description, is_folder, deleted FROM t_file WHERE id = #{fileId} AND deleted = 1

SELECT id, user_id, original_filename, file_size, file_type, storage_path, encrypted_size, encrypted_file_key, iv, auth_tag, file_hash, upload_time, last_download_time, download_count, description, is_folder, deleted FROM t_file WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY upload_time DESC

SELECT id, user_id, original_filename, file_size, file_type, storage_path, encrypted_size, encrypted_file_key, iv, auth_tag, file_hash, upload_time, last_download_time, download_count, description, is_folder, deleted FROM t_file WHERE id = #{fileId} AND user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 1
mapper.update: UPDATE t_file SET download_count = download_count + 1, last_download_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{fileId}
mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(file_size), 0) FROM t_file WHERE deleted = 0
SELECT file_type AS fileType, COUNT(*) AS count FROM t_file WHERE deleted = 0 GROUP BY file_type
